entries.meaning: Partial evidence was treated as sufficient for all claims.
Conflicting evidence was collapsed into a clean claim.
Multiple request IDs were not kept distinguishable.
The model emitted completion without sufficient evidence.
Policy action did not match evidence content status.
Provider content was not a primary parseable JSON object.
Secondary recovery found a scoreable object; primary failure remains.
Append-only request or fulfillment identity linkage failed.
Scorer could not classify the row with adequate confidence.
